$comment: MCP connectors this plugin's skills know how to reach. Connectors are not bundled — they come from the operator's claude.ai session (see /Users/alexzh/.claude/projects/.../memory/reference_mcp_connectors.md). This file documents which connectors each skill expects to find available; if a skill runs in a session without the named connector, it falls back to the documented CLI/REST path.

cloudflare-developer-platform.fallback: wrangler CLI + CF REST API via fetch()

turbopuffer.reason: Turbopuffer exposes no admin API and no MCP connector. All token CRUD is browser-only via turbopuffer.com/dashboard/api-keys.
